text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While taking a stroll in the park... I hear a familiar
voice coming from a sweets shop.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...They may be delicious and all, but you still need
to Bakushin! You've gotta gobble them up!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
No, no. Don'tcha know that ya gotta savor the
flavors for the true Japanese sweet experience?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, perfect timing! We can ask you instead!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I bumped into Inari at the sweets shop and so we
got to talking over some tea...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We both love Japanese sweets, ya see... So we
got a little fired up discussin' the best way to eat
the tea cakes they're servin' today.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the sweet, you've got to Bakushin it
down! Chomp and gulp until your stomach is full!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! These teacakes are made to be
enjoyed with a hot cup of tea. Slowly savorin' the
flavor is the real height of class!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So that's the dilemma! Class or Bakushin!
Naturally, you prefer to Bakushin! Don't you,
Trainer?!
choice_data_list:
One must savor each cake slowly and delicately.
I'm more about the art of sophistication.

You've got to eat as much as you can. I'm all
about the art of Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: N-NO WAY?! You're telling me to not Bakushin?!
choice_data_list: It's actually more about Bakushin-ing them with your entire body and soul one at a time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I SEE!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes! Relish it with all your might! That's super
classy!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My eyes have been opened! One must Bakushin
with sophistication and savor the flavor!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKU... Chomp... SHIN... BAKU... Gulp... SHIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hmm! It's... a sophisticated Bakushin taste!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Sakura Bakushin O deliberately savored a
single cake.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! When you have a chance to eat
sweets, you've gotta enjoy them to your heart's
content!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: To my heart's content, you say?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right! Ya know what? Being open-minded is
also pretty classy!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Open your mind AND your stomach! That's
the true spirit of Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Inari! Trainer! Let's Bakushin together!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Bring it on! Show me how open-minded you can
be! That goes for both sweets and sophistication!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Baku, Baku, Bakushin! Bakubaku, Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ba... Bakubaku Bakushin? ...Bakubaku, Bakushin...
Bakuba—OH!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Urp... Well, how was it? The Bakushin method of consumption?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! Such spirit and determination... This pure
love for the food is to be praised.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The result is a compassionate Bakushin and a
well-satiated Sakura Bakushin O.
